headline: James extends the lead to 52.0 with a +9 haul.
sub: James leads on 52.0, 16 clear of Rob. The day belonged to James (+9), fueled by Norway knocking out Joe's Brazil in the Round of 16. Jim (+3) also climbed. Out of the tournament: Brazil (Joe), Mexico (Rob). Stev (14.0) has ground to make up.
